message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "SalesClerk" as SalesClerk
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI" as ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController" as ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController
participant "ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService
participant "OrderRepository" as OrderRepository
participant "ChangeToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeToBeingDeliveredService

SalesClerk -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to "Being delivered" for customer delivery.
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 2 orderDispatched()
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController ..> ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService : 3 orderDispatched()
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService ..> OrderRepository : 4 orderDispatched()
OrderRepository ..> ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService : 5 ordersDispatched
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService ..> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched.
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI ..> SalesClerk : 7 Asks to choose one of the orders
SalesClerk ..> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 8 Selects the order he wants to change status
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 9 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController ..> ChangeToBeingDeliveredService : 10 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeToBeingDeliveredService ..> OrderRepository : 11 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
OrderRepository ..> ChangeToBeingDeliveredService : 12 Successful change
ChangeToBeingDeliveredService ..> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 12 Successful change
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController ..> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 12 Successful change
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI ..> SalesClerk : 13 Informs that is changed

SalesClerk
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService
OrderRepository
ChangeToBeingDeliveredService

@enduml
